rows.description: Soluta Rectori, Scholaribus, & Officiariis
rows.notes: Consensus reached on header type, description, and no monetary amounts.

rows.description: Stipend. Schol. & Offic. ad fest. Nativ. 1792.
rows.notes: Consensus reached on entry type, description, and monetary values (£20, 6s, 8d), which are clearly visible.
rows.english_description: Stipends paid to scholars and college officers at Christmas (1792).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipends paid to scholars and college officers at Christmas 1792, amounting to £20 6s 8d.

rows.description: Augm. J. New: & Mort. ad dictam festum.
rows.notes: Monetary values are in consensus: £24, 10s, 0d. `gemini-flash`'s description 'J. New: & Mort.' is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'T. New? & Mark.', especially for the initials 'J' and the word 'Mort.'. Visual verification of description.
rows.english_description: Augmentation payment to J. New and Mort for the said feast.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation payment to J. New and Mort for the said feast, amounting to £24 10s 0d.

rows.description: Stip. Thiers ad dict. kabal Domini. 92
rows.notes: Monetary values are in consensus: £33, 6s, 8d. `gemini-flash`'s description 'Thiers ad dict. kabal Domini. 92' is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Thes. ad dict. natal. Domini. 92', particularly 'Thiers' and 'kabal'. Visual verification of description.
rows.english_description: Stipend paid to Thiers for the named occasion (1792).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to Thiers for the said occasion 1792, amounting to £33 6s 8d.

rows.description: Augm. Com. ad dict. Nat. Dom. Henr. Capellany
rows.notes: Monetary values are in consensus: £60, 0s, 0d. `gpt-5-mini`'s description 'Augm. Com. ad dict. Nat. Dom. Henr. Capellany' is visually more accurate for the latter part of the description, especially 'Dom.' and 'Capellany'. The intermediate 'Henr.' is a plausible interpretation of the cramped script, while '& duo' from `gemini-flash` is not discernible. Visual verification of description.
rows.english_description: Augmentation to the common fund and to Henry Capell's chaplaincy at the said Nativity feast.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation to the common fund and to Henry Capell's chaplaincy for the said feast, amounting to £60 0s 0d.

rows.description: Ad fest. Annunciat. 1793.
rows.notes: Consensus on header type and no monetary amounts. `gpt-5-mini`'s description 'Annunciat.' is visually more accurate, as the 'a' before 't' is visible in the original text. Visual verification of description.

rows.description: Stip: deb pro anno proximo preced. 1792,3
rows.notes: Monetary values are in consensus: £31, 13s, 4d. `gemini-flash`'s description 'Stip: deb pro anno proximo preced. 1792,3' is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s transcription. Visual verification of description.
rows.english_description: Stipend due for the coming year covering the preceding year 1792–1793.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend due for the coming year covering the preceding year 1792–1793, amounting to £31 13s 4d.

rows.description: L. Mit. Deb. ad fest. Annunc. 1792
rows.notes: Monetary values are clearly visible as £126, 6s, 10d, contrary to `gpt-5-mini`'s assessment of faintness. `gemini-flash` accurately extracted these. `gemini-flash`'s description 'L. Mit. Deb.' is also more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'L. Wit. Del. del.'. Visual verification of amounts and description, overriding `gpt-5-mini`.
rows.english_description: Payment to L. Mit. Deb. at the Annunciation feast 1792 (entry abbreviated).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to L. Mit. Deb. at the Annunciation feast 1792, amounting to £126 6s 10d.

rows.description: Pro dicto Div. ad fest. Annunc. 1792
rows.notes: Monetary values are clearly visible as £118, 2s, 10d, contradicting `gpt-5-mini`'s assessment. `gemini-flash` accurately extracted these. `gemini-flash`'s description 'Pro dicto Div. ad fest. Annunc. 1792' is also more accurate, as `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly read 'ad Mic.'. Visual verification of amounts and description, overriding `gpt-5-mini`.
rows.english_description: Payment for the said divinity/dividend at the Annunciation feast 1792.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the said divinity/dividend at the Annunciation feast 1792, amounting to £118 2s 10d.

rows.description: Mert. Div. ad fest. Annunc. 1792
rows.notes: Consensus reached on entry type, description, and monetary values (£95, 2s, 2d), which are clearly visible.
rows.english_description: Payment for the Merton division at the Annunciation feast 1792.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the Merton division at the Annunciation feast 1792, amounting to £95 2s 2d.

rows.description: Pro dicto Div. ad fest. Mic. 1792
rows.notes: `gemini-flash` correctly identified the shillings as '1', whereas `gpt-5-mini` misread it as '2'. Pounds and pence (91, 10) are clear and in consensus. Description is in consensus. Visual verification of shillings amount.
rows.english_description: Payment for the said divinity/dividend at Michaelmas 1792.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the said divinity/dividend at Michaelmas 1792, amounting to £91 1s 10d.

rows.description: Riddl: augm: comm: ad fest. Ann. 1793.
rows.notes: Monetary values are in consensus: £33, 12s, 9 ½d. `gemini-flash`'s description 'Riddl: augm: comm: ad fest. Ann. 1793.' is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s transcription. Visual verification of description.
rows.english_description: Augmentation (common) to Riddell at the Annunciation feast 1793.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation (common) to Riddell at the Annunciation feast 1793, amounting to £33 12s 9.5d.

rows.description: Ad fest. S. I. Bapt. 1793
rows.notes: Consensus on header type and no monetary amounts. `gemini-flash`'s description 'S. I.' is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'D. J.'. Visual verification of description.

rows.description: Stip. Schol ad Offic ad dict. fest.
rows.notes: Monetary values are in consensus: £19, 13s, 4d. `gpt-5-mini`'s description 'Stip. Schol ad Offic ad dict. fest.' is visually more accurate due to the capitalized 'O' in 'Offic'. Visual verification of description.
rows.english_description: Stipends to scholars and officers for the said feast.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipends to scholars and officers for the said feast, amounting to £19 13s 4d.

rows.description: Thiers Stip. Do
rows.notes: Monetary values are in consensus: £33, 6s, 0d. The description combines `gemini-flash`'s visually accurate 'Thiers' with `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Stip. Do', which is a more accurate interpretation of the 'D' abbreviation as 'ditto' from the script. Visual verification and combination of description.
rows.english_description: Stipend paid to Thiers at the same feast (resolved from previous row).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to Thiers at the same feast, amounting to £33 6s 0d.

rows.description: Thiers Augm: Comm. & et 2 offic.
rows.notes: Monetary values are in consensus: £56, 0s, 0d. The description combines `gemini-flash`'s accurate 'Thiers' and '& et 2 offic.' with `gpt-5-mini`'s more accurate capitalization for 'Augm: Comm.'. Visual verification and combination of description.
rows.english_description: Augmentation (common) to Thiers and two officers.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation (common) to Thiers and two officers, amounting to £56 0s 0d.

rows.description: Hiddling: augm: comm: pro ¼ an: part
rows.notes: Monetary values are in consensus: £11, 4s, 3 ¼d. `gemini-flash`'s description 'Hiddling: augm: comm: pro ¼ an: part' is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s transcription, especially the name, capitalization, and the explicit '¼' symbol in the text. Visual verification of description.
rows.english_description: Augmentation to Hiddling (common) for a quarter-year part.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation to Hiddling (common) for a quarter-year part, amounting to £11 4s 3.25d.

rows.description: Ad Fest. Div: Mich: 1793

rows.english_description: Stipend paid to Gwinear for the said feast.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to Gwinear for the said feast, amounting to £26 5s 0d.

rows.description: L. Mit. Div. &c.
rows.notes: Monetary values are in consensus: £26, 19s, 8 ½d. `gemini-flash`'s description 'L. Mit. Div. &c.' is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'L. Wlt. Div: Do', specifically 'Mit.' instead of 'Wlt.' and '&c.' instead of 'Do'. Visual verification of description.
rows.english_description: Payment for L. Mit. division and related items at the said feast (abbreviated).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for L. Mit. division and related items at the said feast, amounting to £26 19s 8.5d.
